idea-plugin.name: Framework-First
idea-plugin.description: IDE-only framework-first overlay for Android source trees that compile against .common_libs/framework.jar. The plugin creates a cached synthetic Android SDK home under the IDE system cache, keeps the official platform android.jar as the base, merges in hidden members and classes from the project framework jar, and rebinds Android modules to that overlay SDK for code insight, completion, and navigation. It does not change Gradle build logic.
